🦜 Rohan Sikand

Research & Projects Blog

Stanford CS (AI) B.S., M.S. (2026)

Note: I am on the job market! I am looking for research or engineering positions in machine learning. Please feel free to reach out!

I am interested in AI research, ML engineering, startups, and venture capital.

In the past, I’ve conducted research in self-supervised learning at SAIL, engineered segmentation models at insitro, and built many ML projects.

I am currently interested in RL and reasoning for post-training foundation models and also video models and VLA’s for robot learning. See my (informal) research notebook for more.

I also infrequently write about startups and venture capital on Substack at Rohan’s Random Walks.

In my free time, I play golf and tennis.

Feel free to reach out!
